narrative:
Madison Township has 2,378 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
